title: LITTLE WOMEN Clip - I'm So Sick Of It

sentences.en: I just, I just feel, I just feel like women, they have minds, and they have souls, as well
sentences.ko: 난 그냥, 난 그냥 느끼는 게, 여자들도 지성이 있고, 영혼이 있다고 느껴.

sentences.en: as just hearts, and they've got ambition, and they've got talent, as well as just beauty,
sentences.ko: 마음뿐만 아니라, 야망도 있고, 재능도 있어. 그냥 아름다움만이 아니라.

sentences.en: and I'm so sick of people saying that love is just all a woman is fit for, I'm so sick
sentences.ko: 사랑이 여자한테 딱 맞는 전부라고 말하는 사람들이 너무 지겨워, 정말 지겨워.

sentences.en: of it, but I'm, I'm so lonely.
